title: sida kohautiana var. sampaioi
intro: Sida kohautiana var. sampaioi is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and is a variety of the sida kohautiana plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Sida kohautiana var. sampaioi include reducing fever and relieving respiratory symptoms, such as coughs and congestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
